title: [Synth] Partition trivial cuts before sorting non-trivial ones in CutRewriter, NFCI
body:
Replace a single std::stable_sort over all cuts with:

- std::stable_partition to move trivial cuts to the front, then

- std::stable_sort only on the non-trivial range.

Remove the trivial-cut special case from the comparator and add an assert to ensure the comparator is only applied to non-trivial cuts.

This enforces a strict weak ordering (the previous comparator returned true when both cuts were trivial), preserves the intended priority of trivial cuts, and maintains existing ranking among non-trivial cuts

Fix https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/8946.
